(born 2 September 1993) is a Colombian [footballer](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") who plays as a [central defender](/wiki/Defender_(association_football) "Defender (association football)") for [Liga Nacional](/wiki/Liga_Nacional_de_F%C3%BAtbol_Profesional_de_Honduras "Liga Nacional de Fútbol Profesional de Honduras") club [Honduras Progreso](/wiki/C.D._Honduras_Progreso "C.D. Honduras Progreso").

**Deivy Alexander Balanta Abonía** (born 2 September 1993) is a Colombian [footballer](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") who plays as a [central defender](/wiki/Defender_(association_football) "Defender (association football)") for [Liga Nacional](/wiki/Liga_Nacional_de_F%C3%BAtbol_Profesional_de_Honduras "Liga Nacional de Fútbol Profesional de Honduras") club [Honduras Progreso](/wiki/C.D._Honduras_Progreso "C.D. Honduras Progreso").

## Career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Deivy_Balanta&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Career")]

Balanta started his youth career with [Atlético Nacional](/wiki/Atl%C3%A9tico_Nacional "Atlético Nacional"). He was loaned to [All Boys](/wiki/All_Boys "All Boys") in Argentina, but did not feature with the [Argentine Primera División](/wiki/Argentine_Primera_Divisi%C3%B3n "Argentine Primera División") club.

Balanta joined [Alianza Petrolera](/wiki/Alianza_Petrolera_F.C. "Alianza Petrolera F.C.") on 8 July 2012.[[3]](#cite_note-3) He achieved promotion with Alianza Petrolera by winning the [2012 Categoría Primera B](/wiki/2012_Categor%C3%ADa_Primera_B_season "2012 Categoría Primera B season").[[4]](#cite_note-4) He was called up to represent [Colombia](/wiki/Colombia_national_under-20_football_team "Colombia national under-20 football team") at the [2013 South American Youth Football Championship](/wiki/2013_South_American_Youth_Football_Championship "2013 South American Youth Football Championship")[[5]](#cite_note-5) and the [2013 FIFA U-20 World Cup](/wiki/2013_FIFA_U-20_World_Cup "2013 FIFA U-20 World Cup").[[6]](#cite_note-6)

On 6 January 2016, Balanta joined [Atlético Junior](/wiki/Atl%C3%A9tico_Junior "Atlético Junior").[[7]](#cite_note-7) In July 2016, he extended his contract with the Barranquilla team.[[8]](#cite_note-8) He was also called up to represent Colombia at the [2016 Summer Olympics](/wiki/Football_at_the_2016_Summer_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_tournament "Football at the 2016 Summer Olympics – Men's tournament").[[9]](#cite_note-9) Balanta contract was not extended, and he became a free agent in June 2019.[[10]](#cite_note-10)

On 17 July 2019, Balanta joined [Millonarios](/wiki/Millonarios_F.C. "Millonarios F.C.") on loan for one year.[[11]](#cite_note-11)

On 7 January 2021, Balanta joined [Once Caldas](/wiki/Once_Caldas "Once Caldas").[[12]](#cite_note-12)

In December 2022, Balanta joined Honduran club [Honduras Progreso](/wiki/C.D._Honduras_Progreso "C.D. Honduras Progreso").[[13]](#cite_note-13)
